allow: Bash(cd g:/phia-website/phia-site-claude && mkdir -p src/components/brand public/brand /tmp/logodev && echo "dirs ready")
Bash(ls -la /tmp/logodev/render.cjs 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; find / -name "mark.svg" -path "*logodev*" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "---g tmp---"; ls -la g:/tmp/ 2>/dev/null | head)

Bash(mkdir -p g:/tmp/logodev && cp g:/tmp/*.png g:/tmp/logodev/ 2>/dev/null; cp /tmp/logodev/render.cjs g:/tmp/logodev/render.cjs 2>/dev/null; ls g:/tmp/logodev/render.cjs 2>/dev/null && echo "copied" || echo "need rewrite")
